options.text: It's obvious—students using AI didn't drop out, so AI must have caused it.
I agree that longitudinal data would strengthen the claim; however, the correlation is strong and consistent with prior studies on engagement and retention.
I didn't mean causation—I just meant it's a nice trend.
I'll do a five-year study next time.

content.explanation: 正确答案承认方法局限，同时用相关证据和文献支持结论，体现学术严谨性。选项1错误地建立因果关系；选项3削弱自身主张；选项4回避当前问题，未提供辩护。
content.speakerText: Your conclusion says AI reduces dropout rates, but you didn't track students over time. How can you claim causation?
content.speakerTextCn: 你的结论称AI降低了辍学率，但你没有长期追踪学生，如何声称因果关系？

content.scenarioHint: 教授在听取学生的研究汇报时，对研究方法的代表性提出质疑，学生需要解释为何选择特定样本或方法。
content.speakerText: Your findings are based on interviews with only 12 graduate students—how can you claim these results reflect the broader undergraduate population?
content.speakerTextCn: 你的发现仅基于对12名研究生的访谈——你如何能声称这些结果能反映更广泛的本科生群体？

options.text: I picked graduate students because they're more articulate and gave deeper insights.
The sample was limited, but graduate students in my university mirror undergraduate learning behaviors in key areas like tech adoption and academic motivation.
I didn't have time to survey undergraduates, so I used whoever was available.
All students are the same anyway—why does it matter who I interviewed?

content.explanation: 正确答案通过将样本与目标群体建立逻辑关联（研究生在技术采纳和学习动机上与本科生具有可比性），体现了学术严谨性。干扰项1是主观理由，未提供依据；干扰项3暴露研究设计缺陷，缺乏学术诚信；干扰项4完全否定研究差异，违背基本研究伦理。

content.scenarioHint: 教授在学生展示研究结论后，质疑其结论的因果性，学生需解释如何排除其他变量影响。
content.speakerText: You say AI tools increased student participation, but didn't the semester-long project requirement also play a role?
content.speakerTextCn: 你说AI工具提升了学生参与度，但整个学期的项目要求难道没有影响吗？

options.text: The project was mandatory for everyone, so it can't explain why only some students became more active.
I didn't think about that—I just focused on the AI tool's impact.
Project requirements were too vague to affect participation meaningfully.
Students didn't even notice the project—it was all about the AI.

content.explanation: 正确答案通过区分变量影响范围（项目要求对所有人相同，而AI影响仅体现在部分学生），合理排除混杂变量，体现因果推理能力。干扰项2回避问题，暴露思维缺陷；干扰项3和4都武断否定其他变量，缺乏实证支持，不符合学术规范。
